headline: Dover Fueling Solutions Launches ProGauge DMP MagRF to Transform Wired Probes into Wireless Connectivity for Retail and Industrial Fueling Operations
summary: Dover Fueling Solutions ("DFS"), a part of Dover (NYSE: DOV) and a leading global provider of advanced customer-focused technologies, services and solutions in the fuel and convenience retail industries, today announced the launch of the ProGauge® DMP™ MagRF, delivering enhanced wireless connectivity for ProGauge® DMP™ Magnetostrictive probes and ProGauge® DMP Flex™ Magnetostrictive probes (formerly branded DFS DMP™).

content.title: Dover Fueling Solutions Launches ProGauge DMP MagRF to Transform Wired Probes into Wireless Connectivity for Retail and Industrial Fueling Operations
content.summary: Dover Fueling Solutions ("DFS"), a part of Dover (NYSE: DOV) and a leading global provider of advanced customer-focused technologies, services and solutions in the fuel and convenience retail industries, today announced the launch of the ProGauge® DMP™ MagRF, delivering enhanced wireless connectivity for ProGauge® DMP™ Magnetostrictive probes and ProGauge® DMP Flex™ Magnetostrictive probes (formerly branded DFS DMP™).
